title: re-land pick/oracle/graph-highlighter (was jssm#798)
manager: Re-land the pick, oracle, and graph-highlighter features from existing branches — interactive selection of states/edges, an oracle for expected behavior, and live highlighting of the current path. These are the interaction primitives that make a rendered machine explorable rather than a static picture; the work exists on branches and needs to be brought current and merged.
cs: branches exist; pick work is also gated by jssm#790/deferred-until-pick
